channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-18T23:31Z — 1724 outages, 132,882 customers, 216 fair-weather, 19 DC-proximate
item.description: VA-DOM: 9990 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 3869 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 3682 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | BGE: 3216 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | NE-EVERSOURCE: 2539 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)
